DDL.statement: ALTER TABLE "APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY" ADD ("TRAY_SEQUENCE" NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL)
ALTER TABLE "APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY" ADD CONSTRAINT "APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("PANEL_ID", "TRAY_ID", "TRAY_SEQUENCE")

MERGE INTO APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY t USING ( SELECT PANEL_ID, TRAY_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PANEL_ID ORDER BY TRAY_ID) AS rn FROM APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY ) x ON (x.PANEL_ID = t.PANEL_ID AND x.TRAY_ID = t.TRAY_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.TRAY_SEQUENCE = x.rn
UPDATE APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY SET DESCRIPTION = 'Tray ' || TO_CHAR(TRAY_SEQUENCE) WHERE TRAY_SEQUENCE IS NOT NULL

CREATE VIEW VIEW_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES as (SELECT APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY.PANEL_ID, APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY.TRAY_SEQUENCE, APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES.TRAY_ID, APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES.SAMPLE_ID, APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES.SEQUENCE_ID FROM APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES INNER JOIN APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY ON APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY.TRAY_ID = APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES.TRAY_ID)
